name: Grilled Turkeyspears with 3 Sauces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the turkey filets by slicing them into spears.
2. Cut the limes in half and place them on the grill to char slightly.
3. Place the pepperoni slices over the hot coals for a few minutes to crisp up.
4. Arrange the corn cobs around the base of the grill.
5. Brush the turkey filets with oil, chili powder, and seasonings.
6. Grill the spears over medium heat until cooked through, about 4-5 minutes per side.
7. Serve the grilled turkeyspears alongside the prepared sauces. Enjoy!
